source_pr.title: executor, sessionctx/variable: small code improvements
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/38180

Problem Summary:

Test-coverage on sessionctx/variable/variable.go is increased to 95% (from 91.9%). Coverage for the package still sits at 45.5% (from 44.9%) because many variables in sysvar.go are not individually tested.

Small code-reorganization outside of tests (function neutral).

### What is changed and how it works?

This is a function neutral change. 

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Refactor + test-coverage improvements for sessionctx/variable and infoschema variables view; no concrete flaky failure signature is captured in this case.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (refactor + tests).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch is a function-neutral refactor plus additional unit tests/coverage for sysvar validation/scope string conversion. It does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent failure, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Refactor sysvar scope string handling and add unit tests for sysvar validation/scope.

evidence: evidence: executor: enable race for executor/aggfuncs (#38262)
